user_query: I am planning a road trip from Seattle to Portland next week. Can you provide me with the current gas prices in Washington state? Additionally, I would like to know the train schedule between Seattle and Portland on the day of my journey. Lastly, could you suggest some good hotels in Portland for a comfortable stay? Thank you!

TaskList.description: Retrieve the current gas prices in Washington state.
Fetch the train schedule between Seattle and Portland for the chosen date.
Suggest good hotels in Portland based on customer reviews and comfort level.
